purpose: Data table for the Portal 1 credits recreation. It defines global ASCII art frames, the personnel credits list, and timed lyric segments for "Still Alive".
invariants: lyrics entries provide delay, text, nonewline, clear, and changepicture fields because portal/cake.js reads those names directly.
changepicture values must reference stringified keys in asciiart, or -1 when no art change is wanted.
credits remains an ordered array; scroll timing is derived from the total character count.
gotchas: delay values are strings but are intentionally multiplied by cake.delayMultiplier, relying on JavaScript numeric coercion.
Text is injected through string-form setTimeout in portal/cake.js, so unescaped double quotes in lyric or credit text can break playback.
